home.meta_title: Áras Living — Bespoke Furniture & Interiors, Dublin
home.meta_description: Wardrobes, kitchens, and interior joinery designed around Irish homes and built in our Dublin workshop.
home.hero_subheadline: Bespoke wardrobes, kitchens, and interior joinery from our Dublin workshop.
home.intro_body: For over two decades, Áras Living has designed and built furniture for homes and spaces across Ireland. Every piece begins with a conversation and ends with a measured fit.
home.cta_subheadline: Tell us about your space. We will respond within two business days.
home.material_world_statement: Timbers, lacquers, stone and metal — chosen for how they age, feel, and fit.
home.trust_headline: Measured in millimetres, built on trust
home.showroom_invitation_body: Visit our Dublin showroom to open drawers, feel handles, and see how timber responds to natural light.

about.meta_description: A Dublin workshop where traditional skill meets contemporary design.
about.hero_subheadline: A Dublin workshop where traditional skill meets contemporary design.
about.story_body_1: Áras Living was founded on the belief that enduring furniture is made slowly, by people who understand timber. From the first sketch to the final installation, every decision is guided by proportion, material, and purpose.
about.story_body_2: We work with architects, interior designers, and private clients across Ireland, turning complex spaces into calm, considered interiors.
about.craft_body: We source solid hardwoods and curated veneers from trusted European suppliers. Our finishes are applied by hand, and our hardware is chosen for how it feels after years of daily use.
about.team_body: A small team of designers, makers, and installers. Everyone who works on your project shares the same standard: would this sit comfortably in our own home?

services.meta_description: Bespoke furniture and interior joinery for residential and commercial spaces across Ireland.
services.hero_subheadline: Residential and commercial work from our Dublin workshop.
services.residential_body: Wardrobes, kitchens, dressing rooms, and living spaces designed around the way you live.
services.commercial_body: Workplaces, retail spaces, hospitality joinery, and one-off commissions for brands that value craft.
services.materials_statement: Materials chosen for how they age, feel, and fit.
